recommendations.title: 4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days
recommendations.overview: Two college roommates have 24 hours to make the ultimate choice as they finalize arrangements for a black market abortion.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Hills
recommendations.overview: Alina returns to Romania from Germany, hoping to bring Voichita—the only person in the world she loves and was loved by—back with her. But Voichita has found God, and God is the hardest lover of all to best.

recommendations.title: Graduation
recommendations.overview: After his daughter is assaulted and left with an injury that may jeopardize her opportunity to study in the UK, a Romanian doctor decides to do whatever it takes to secure her future.

recommendations.title: Rocks

recommendations.title: Cria!
recommendations.overview: Ana, an eight-year-old girl living in Madrid with her grandmother and two sisters, mourns the death of her mother.

recommendations.title: A Simple Life
recommendations.overview: After suffering a stroke, an altruistic maid announces that she wants to quit her job and move into an old people's home.
